productDisplayName: Fossil Women Multi Coloured Ombre Braid Belt
description: Style Note Crafted from pure leather, this fossil belt has a refined finish complemented by its smart gunmetal buckle. Fossil leather breathes, regulates temperature to suit the climate, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance that makes it a must-have in your wardrobe! Product Details Multi- coloured belt made of leather in a braided design Tang clasp with a fixed loop to offer a snug Fit and to hold the belt in place Branding embossed at the end of the belt Material and Care Leather Use a brass polish to maintain buckle shine Use a branded leather conditioner to protect the belt
